payload.description: Long-running optimizer and procedure runs can fail after hours of useful work when AppSync/DynamoDB throttling hits procedure/task/chat persistence writes. Add throttling-aware retry/backoff in the dashboard GraphQL client plus a longer write policy for procedure-runtime persistence surfaces (procedure metadata/status, task stages/progress, chat/HITL writes), with regression tests proving retries succeed and exhausted retry windows fail clearly.
payload.title: Harden procedure persistence against transient GraphQL throttling
